    Index

    A B C D E F G H I J L M O P R S T U V W 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

    G

    generateToken(String) - Method in class com.pitlane.pitlane.security.JwtUtil
    Generates a token for the user using the secret
    getAlertsByUser(User) - Method in class com.pitlane.pitlane.service.AlertService
    Extracts all the vehicles from the user and uses the method getAlerts to extract alerts from the maintenances from those vehicles
    getAllUserVehicles(User) - Method in class com.pitlane.pitlane.controller.VehicleController
    Gets all vehicles that are associated with the logged user
    getAuthorities() - Method in class com.pitlane.pitlane.model.User
    Returns a list of permission roles for the account, returning empty due to roles not being implemented this project phase
    getCosts(User, String) - Method in class com.pitlane.pitlane.controller.CostsController
    Generates the info for the costs dashboards specific to the user logged
    getCostsSummary(User, String) - Method in class com.pitlane.pitlane.service.CostsService
    Calculates the costs grouped by category and by vehicles, filtering by the period selected by the user
    getPassword() - Method in class com.pitlane.pitlane.model.User
    Overrides the method to return the account password to instead return custom passwordHash field
    getUserAlerts(User) - Method in class com.pitlane.pitlane.controller.AlertController
    Gets all the alerts, pending or resolved, for the logged user
    getUserInfo(User) - Method in class com.pitlane.pitlane.controller.UserController
    Gives info about the account for the profile page
    getUsername() - Method in class com.pitlane.pitlane.model.User
    Overrides the method to return the account username to instead return email field used to identify the account
    getUsernameFromToken(String) - Method in class com.pitlane.pitlane.security.JwtUtil
    Extracts the username from the payload of the given token
    getUserVehicle(UUID, User) - Method in class com.pitlane.pitlane.service.VehiclesService
    Gets a vehicle by an id and the user who owns it
    getUserVehicles(User) - Method in class com.pitlane.pitlane.service.VehiclesService
    Gets all the vehicles for the logged user in the dashboard page
    getVehicle(UUID, int, User) - Method in class com.pitlane.pitlane.controller.VehicleController
    Updates the mileage of a specific vehicle
    getVehicle(UUID, User) - Method in class com.pitlane.pitlane.controller.VehicleController
    Gets a vehicle from the database by receiving its id
    GlobalExceptionHandler - Class in com.pitlane.pitlane.exception
    Class that allows to catch and treat exceptions and returns more detailed reasons for the exception as a response
    GlobalExceptionHandler() - Constructor for class com.pitlane.pitlane.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler
